skills.name: robots-txt
skills.description: Publishes crawl rules, AI crawler policy, content signals, and sitemap location.

skills.name: link-headers
skills.description: Documents agent discovery link relations exposed by the site.

skills.name: markdown-negotiation
skills.description: Documents markdown alternatives for agent-readable site content.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: Publishes an RFC 9727 API catalog and OpenAPI description.

skills.name: webmcp
skills.description: Exposes site navigation and discovery tools to compatible browser agents.
